hero.title: Document an accident — no paper, no confusion.
hero.subtitle: boom.contact guides you step by step to collect the useful information, add photos, location, statements and signatures, then generate a timestamped PDF file to send to your insurer.

landing.subtitle: Complete your digital accident report in 5 minutes. Multi-language OCR, shared QR code, dual digital signature, timestamped PDF.

stress.title: Designed for stressful situations
stress.text: After a crash, your mind isn't clear. boom.contact moves step by step, in your language, and keeps a record of every piece of information collected. Everything works from the phone browser, even on a limited connection.
stress.emergencyText: boom.contact does not replace emergency services, the police, a lawyer or your insurer. If anyone is injured or in danger, contact emergency services first.

items.title: Delivery
items.desc: Timestamped PDF ready to attach to the claim.

items.a: boom.contact is an app that helps document a road accident from a phone: inviting drivers by QR, photos, voice, sketch, signatures, then generating a timestamped PDF report to send to your insurer.

items.q: Do I need to install an app?
items.a: No. boom.contact runs directly in the phone browser (Safari, Chrome, Firefox). You can also add it to your home screen as a web app (PWA) for offline access.

items.q: What if the other driver doesn't have the app?
items.a: You create the session and a QR code appears. The other driver scans it with their phone: boom.contact opens in their browser, with no sign-up or download.

items.q: Is the PDF report accepted by my insurer?
items.a: The timestamped PDF report is meant to accompany your claim. boom.contact does not guarantee its acceptance, which is up to your insurer based on your contract and jurisdiction.

items.q: Does it work if the other driver speaks another language?
items.a: Yes. Each driver uses the interface in their own language. The final report is generated for each driver.
Data is encrypted in transit, sessions are automatically deleted after a delay, and the police are never notified automatically — only on your explicit action.
From CHF / EUR 4.90 for one report. Pack of 3 reports at 12.90 (−12%), pack of 10 at 34.90 (−29%). No subscription, credits never expire.

idle.title: Scan your documents
idle.subtitle:
Start with your registration document.
The insurance document is recommended.
idle.reg_sub: Swiss registration, French carte grise, Zulassung DE, V5C GB… — required
idle.tip: 💡 Insurance document recommended. Green card (IMIC), certificate of insurance, Insurance ID card — this document contains your insurer and policy number. Without it, you will need to enter them manually.

greencard.title: Insurance document?
greencard.subtitle: Scan your green card (IMIC), certificate of insurance, Certificate of Motor Insurance or Insurance ID Card. This document contains your insurer and policy number. It is recommended — without it, manual entry will be required.

scanning.subtitle: Claude Vision is reading your documents

cgu.privacy_version: Compliant with EU GDPR 2016/679 and Swiss nFADP · March 2026
cgu.consent_cgu: I accept the Terms & Conditions and the Privacy Policy
cgu.consent_marketing: I agree that PEP's Swiss SA may use my email to offer complementary services from its applications (claims management, insurance, financial services). Optional — revocable at any time.

cgu_sections.title: 1. Purpose
cgu_sections.text: boom.contact is a digital service published by PEP's Swiss SA, Bellevue 7, 2950 Courgenay, Jura, Switzerland. It enables the creation of digital amicable accident reports, to be sent to your insurer.

cgu_sections.title: 2. Acceptance
cgu_sections.text: Use of the service implies acceptance of these Terms. Any use for illegal, fraudulent or unlawful purposes is strictly prohibited.

cgu_sections.title: 3. Service description
cgu_sections.text: boom.contact enables: (a) document capture by OCR (registration, green card); (b) real-time session sharing between drivers via QR code; (c) generation of a digitally signed timestamped PDF; (d) sending the PDF by email to each driver. The service does not replace each driver's legal obligation to declare the claim to their own insurer within the contractual timeframe.

cgu_sections.title: 4. Pricing
cgu_sections.text: Access to the service is paid according to the packages available at time of purchase. Prices are shown inclusive of tax. Payment is processed via Stripe, a PCI-DSS certified provider. Each package corresponds to a number of credits to initiate reports. Credits have no expiry date. No refund can be granted once a report is finalised and the PDF generated.

cgu_sections.title: 5. Legal value
cgu_sections.text: The digital document generated by boom.contact constitutes an amicable accident report recognised by insurance companies. PEP's Swiss SA does not guarantee acceptance in all countries and recommends submitting it to your insurer within the legal deadlines.

cgu_sections.title: 6. Liability
cgu_sections.text: PEP's Swiss SA shall not be held liable for: (a) input or OCR errors not corrected by the user; (b) refusal by an insurer to accept the report; (c) any dispute between drivers. PEP's Swiss SA's liability is limited to the amount paid for the service.

cgu_sections.title: 7. Intellectual property
cgu_sections.text: The software, trademarks, logos and content of boom.contact are the exclusive property of PEP's Swiss SA. Any reproduction without authorisation is prohibited.

cgu_sections.title: 8. Applicable law
cgu_sections.text: These Terms are governed by Swiss law. Any dispute shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of the Canton of Jura, Switzerland.

privacy_sections.title: Data controller
privacy_sections.text: PEP's Swiss SA, Bellevue 7, 2950 Courgenay, Jura, Switzerland. DPO contact: privacy@boom.contact

privacy_sections.title: Data collected
privacy_sections.text: In the context of the service: email address, name, address (extracted from OCR documents), licence plate, vehicle data, GPS coordinates of the accident, digital signatures, insurance data (company name, policy number). This data is strictly necessary for the provision of the service.

privacy_sections.title: Legal basis
privacy_sections.text: Processing necessary for contract performance (Art. 6.1.b GDPR) for accident report data. Explicit consent (Art. 6.1.a GDPR) for any secondary commercial use.

privacy_sections.title: Retention period
privacy_sections.text: Active sessions: 2 hours. PDFs and report data: 30 days then automatic deletion. Accounting data (payments): 10 years (legal obligation). Email and consents: until consent is withdrawn.

privacy_sections.title: Data sharing
privacy_sections.text: Your data is NEVER sold to third parties. It may be shared with: (a) Stripe Inc. for payment processing; (b) Resend Inc. for transactional email sending; (c) Anthropic Inc. for OCR analysis of documents (data processed without retention per Anthropic's Terms). If you expressly consent (optional box below), PEP's Swiss SA may use your email to offer complementary services from its applications.

privacy_sections.title: Your rights
privacy_sections.text: Access, rectification, erasure, portability, objection. Request to: privacy@boom.contact. Response within 30 days. Right of appeal to the FDPIC (Switzerland) or your national data protection authority.

intro.title: Before you start
intro.body: boom.contact helps you document an accident and generate a structured PDF report. In case of injury, danger, a fleeing party, serious disagreement or legal obligation, immediately contact emergency services, the police or the competent authorities. The information provided remains the responsibility of the participants. You can enter information manually if you prefer not to use the camera, microphone or location.

guest_accept.checkbox: I accept the Terms of Use and have read the Privacy Policy.
guest_accept.note: I understand that my information will be used to generate the accident PDF report and that the information provided remains my responsibility.

legal.signature_confirm: I confirm that the information I have provided is accurate to the best of my knowledge and I agree that my signature will be included in the PDF report.
legal.payment_notice: By continuing to payment, you understand that the payment covers the generation and delivery of the PDF report. The information provided remains the responsibility of the participants.
legal.mic_notice: By using the microphone, your voice statement will be transcribed to be included in the accident report. You can use text input instead.

injury_confirm.body: Injury photos may contain sensitive data. Make sure you have the consent of the person concerned, unless required for safety or by legal obligation.

legal.pdf_ready_body: The required signatures have been recorded. The PDF report is ready. Check the information before sending it to your insurer.
